CarrotMessage: Blimey! I'm out of carrots for the donkey!
DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write detailed delivery-scheduling diagnostics to the BepInEx console - phase transitions, donkey state, carrot checks, and retry reasons. Turn this on when reporting bugs. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.morning_delivery.name: Morning Delivery
cfg.morning_delivery.desc: Trigger a body delivery at the start of the morning phase (just after sunrise). Default: on.
cfg.day_delivery.name: Day Delivery
cfg.day_delivery.desc: Trigger a body delivery at the start of the daytime phase (around midday). Default: off - turn on if you want an extra mid-day delivery on top of the morning/evening ones.
cfg.evening_delivery.name: Evening Delivery
cfg.evening_delivery.desc: Trigger a body delivery at the start of the evening phase (late afternoon). Default: on.
cfg.night_delivery.name: Night Delivery
cfg.night_delivery.desc: Trigger a body delivery at the start of the night phase (after sunset). Default: off - the donkey would otherwise arrive right as you are heading to bed.
cfg.donkey_speed.name: Donkey Speed
cfg.donkey_speed.desc: How fast the donkey walks to the cemetery and back. Vanilla speed is 1; higher values shorten the round trip so each delivery finishes well within its time slot. Raise this to 10-20 if deliveries feel like they arrive too late.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
